metadata.title: Knock on Wood (7" Edit)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:35.25] I don't wanna lose this good thing that I got
[00:42.11] 'Cause if I do, I will surely, surely lose a lot
[00:49.47] 'Cause your love is better than any love I know
[00:56.32] It's like thunder, lightning
[01:00.69] The way you love me is frightening
[01:03.23] You better knock, knock on wood, baby
[01:09.32] Ooh, ooh-ooh-ooh, baby
[01:16.77] Ooh, ooh-ooh-ooh, ooh, ooh-ooh
[01:23.49] I'm not superstitious about you
[01:28.20] But I can't take no chance
[01:32.11] You got me spinnin', baby
[01:35.12] You know that I'm in a trance
[01:37.62] 'Cause your love is better than any love I know
[01:44.50] It's like thunder, lightning
[01:48.99] The way you love me is frightening
[01:50.76] You better knock, knock on wood, baby
[02:01.86] Ooh, ooh-ooh-ooh, baby
[02:06.34] Ooh, ooh-ooh-ooh, ooh, ooh-ooh
[02:08.71] (Think I better knock, knock, knock on wood)

[02:14.71] (Think I better knock, knock, knock on wood)
[02:18.12] (Think I better knock, knock, knock on wood)
[02:22.15] (Think I better knock)
[02:23.04] Ooh, baby

[02:32.66] It's no secret about it
[02:37.08] 'Cause with his lovin' touch
[02:39.83] He sees to it that I get enough
[02:46.56] Feel his touch, all over
[02:50.85] You know it means so much
[02:53.39] He's like thunder, fast and lightnin'
[02:57.72] The way you love me is frightenin'
[03:00.36] You better knock, knock, knock on wood, baby
[03:09.31]
